name: Criss Cross Voltas (Travelling Voltas to R and L)
preceding_figure_names: Criss Cross Bota Fogos (Shadow Bota Fogos), Foot Change 7: R Contra Position to Open Counter Promenade Position, Maypole, Natural Basic Movement, Reverse Basic Movement, Samba Locks, Samba Walk: Side, Side Basic Movement
following_figure_names: Reverse Basic Movement, Whisk To Left, Samba Walk: Stationary, Bota Fogos To Promenade and Counter Promenade, Argentine Crosses, Criss Cross Bota Fogos (Shadow Bota Fogos), Maypole (Man turning L, when ending in Open PP; or Man turning R, when ending in Open CPP), Foot Change 3: Promenade or Open Promenade to Right Shadow Position (when ending in Open PP), Samba Locks (when ending in Open CPP), Samba Walk in PP: LF (2 Samba Walks in RSP commenced with LF, Lady RF, then Rolling off the Arm, when ending in R Side Position), Rolling Off The Arm (when ending in R Side Position with Double Hand Hold)
notes:
Alternatives: amount of turn is unchanged.
step 6 & 7 may be danced as 2 & 3 of a Bota Fogo (Man turning L and lady R). 
step 13 & 14 may be danced as 2 & 3 of a Bota Fogo (Man turning R and Lady L).

steps.action: Dance 2 bars of Traveling Voltas to R, curving to L behind lady's back
comments: Raise L arm and gradually move it to L to lead lady to pass in front and to L side.

steps.action: Dance 2 bars of Traveling Voltas to L, curving to R behind lady's back, to end facing her in Closed Position
comments: Raise L arm and gradually move it to R to lead Lady to pass in front.
Lower arm slightly over 8-14 to return to normal position.

steps.action: Dance 2 bars of Traveling Voltas to L, curving to R passing in front of Man, end in Open CPP RLRLRLR | 1/4 to R over 1-7
comments: Do Criss Cross at the end of step 7 'a4': ' & ': Lady: straighten both legs, commence to turn R
' 1 ' (step 8): Lady: cross RF in front of LF with weight.

steps.action: Dance 2 bars of Traveling Voltas to R, curving to L passing in front of Man to end facing him in Closed Position, LRLRLRL | 3/8 to L over 8-14
comments: Alternatives: amount of turn is unchanged.
step 6 & 7 may be danced as 2 & 3 of a Bota Fogo (Man turning L and lady R).
step 13 & 14 may be danced as 2 & 3 of a Bota Fogo (Man turning R and Lady L).
